relationships.context: The positions.py script audits and manages Position entities in the knowledge system
positions.py lives within the N5 scripts directory
Type B conversation end workflow tracks positions created, extended, and connected
Final Audit is the verification step within the Type B conversation end workflow
Evidence from the Content Library is cataloged during Type B conversation close

Listed as a content_library evidence item in the summary template
